message:
feat: add finalize records to cancellable tasks, policy-invalid gate failure, and deterministic IDs in verifier toolkit

Three targeted improvements across runtime, supply chain, and tools:

cancellable_task.rs:
- Produce FinalizeRecord during task finalization with drain status,
  obligation closure proof, and timing data
- Attach FinalizeRecord to task entry on incomplete closure proof path
- Emit FN_CX_007 and FN_CX_008 audit events for finalize-with-incomplete
  and lane-slot-release flows
- Update tests to verify phase transitions and count invariants after
  incomplete closure finalization

provenance_gate.rs:
- Add upfront policy validation in evaluate_gate() — if policy.validate()
  returns PolicyInvalid, immediately return a failed GateDecision with
  PolicyInvalid failure reason (fail-closed behavior)
- Add test: invalid_policy_fails_closed_with_policy_invalid_reason

verifier_toolkit.rs:
- Replace UUID-based IDs with deterministic SHA-256 digest-derived IDs
  for reproducible verification runs
- Replace chrono::Utc::now() timestamps with deterministic timestamps
  derived from content hashes (base: 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z + digest offset)
- Add ValidationVerdict::label() const method for string representation
- Remove uuid dependency in favor of hex-encoded hash prefixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
